title: Taste-aware music retrieval from audio embeddings
innovation_summary: Taste-aware music retrieval from audio embeddings: We formalise taste-from-audio prediction as a content-based music information retrieval benchmark over a perceptually validated multi-source corpus, comparing ten frozen audio encoders from the four HEAR.
why_it_matters: Overall signal 79/100 driven by novelty 100 and practical impact 68.
Primary categories: CLAP-text baseline, HEAR families, RMSE, audio encoders, audio-bandstop knockout, content-based retrieval.
